name: controlflow-codex
description: Lightweight standalone ControlFlow plugin for Codex: high-quality plan generation in the shared ControlFlow format, inline adversarial plan verification (zero subagents), and evidence-backed review layered over the native Codex toolset. 3 skills, 0 subagents.

interface.shortDescription: Slim 3-skill ControlFlow for Codex: plan, verify, review
interface.longDescription: Brings the portable parts of ControlFlow into Codex when extra discipline is worth the overhead: schema-sourced plan generation, inline adversarial plan verification (zero subagents), and evidence-backed review layered over native Codex. 3 skills, 0 subagents — no orchestration, router, plan-audit, or verifier subagents.
defaultPrompt: Use ControlFlow for Codex to plan this non-trivial repository task.
Generate a ControlFlow plan for this change and save it under plans/.
Verify this saved ControlFlow plan inline before implementation.
Review the implementation diff against the approved ControlFlow plan.
